projects.name: FOLEY ENGINE
projects.description: Generative Foley and movement-sound engine for creating/editing synced sound effects.
projects.latestVersion: v0.1.x early line; plugin now shows up, but sound realism is not acceptable.
projects.nextAction: Plan v0.2.0 — reference-calibrated Foley behavior model.
projects.firstAction: Collect short WAV references, 1–5 seconds each, ideally 3–5 per Foley category.
projects.blocker: Sounds still feel like modified drum hits/noise rather than realistic Foley events.
projects.decisionNeeded: Need reference examples and category anatomy before the next serious engine build.
projects.recommendedChoice: Use reference-calibrated event anatomy per category instead of drum-hit-plus-noise synthesis.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Host visibility issue appears resolved; the major blocker shifted to realism and category-specific sound behavior.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Gather realistic short Foley references and define category-specific event anatomy for v0.2.0.
projects.notToday: Do not keep tailoring the same noise/drum-hit source; the engine needs category-specific anatomy.
